document_text:
Project: ZenithSwap
Chain: Ethereum
Category: DEX

Overview
ZenithSwap is an open-source decentralized exchange. The code has been fully audited by Trail of Bits and is governed by a DAO (no admin key).

Tokenomics
Token: ZEN
Total Supply: 100,000,000
Team Allocation: 10%
Liquidity: Locked for 5 years.
No mint function exists.

Security
No vulnerabilities were found during the audit.
